name: Full Swing PT and Golf
about: Full Swing PT and Golf is a facility that merges physical therapy with golf instruction and performance training. They offer a range of services including golf lessons, putting instruction, golf simulator usage, and specialized programs like Golf Speed Training and Golf Performance. The facility is equipped with advanced technology, including a golf simulator for practice and play, and focuses on holistic player development through biomechanical analysis and injury prevention. Their services cater to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned players, providing personalized coaching and training to improve swing mechanics, physical conditioning, and on-course strategy.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced golf simulator with high-definition graphics and realistic ball flight tracking
Integration of physical therapy with golf instruction for injury prevention and performance enhancement
Convenient and accessible practice environment with customizable simulator settings

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website mentions providing club rentals, suggesting you may not need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, but it is not explicitly stated whether outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but golf simulator sessions are typically booked per hour, and the duration can vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf exercises and programs, indicating it is equipped to accommodate younger golfers.
